series_description: Board agendas, minutes, packets, handouts, and other corresponding materials generated for monthly meetings of the Ohio Housing Finance Agency Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Committee agendas, minutes, packets, handouts and other corresponding materials generated for meetings of the various committees created by the Ohio Housing Finance Agency Board.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years ; Electronic: Retain 2 years

series_description: Subject/Project Files created by employees in the Director''s Office documenting information by subject or project.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain two years after end of fiscal year in which the subject/project file was created

series_title: Litigation Files Maintained by Legal Office
series_description: All court documents received by OHFA, drafted by Ohio Attorney General''s Office, filed by Ohio Attorney General''s Office and all notes taken by or received by the Chief Legal Counsel or any other employees of OHFA related to any litigation matter filed by or against OHFA.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed

series_description: Loan Files will be organized by project name, by fiscal year, by loan type to include the following types of loans: housing development, housing development assistance program, Financial Adjustment Factor, Capital Funding to End Homelessness Initiative, Recycled Tax Credit Assistance Program, Neighborhood Stabilization Program, Community Improvement Program loans.
retention_statement: Paper: Two years after affordability period of project (as that term is defined by the Internal Revenue Code) is ended. If included in audit it would be the year the loan is made and not when it is paid off.
